channel.title: PGR Shareholder Letters — Audio Archive
channel.description: AI-generated audio overviews of Progressive Corporation (NYSE: PGR) CEO Tricia Griffith's quarterly shareholder letters, powered by Google NotebookLM.
channel.author: Jeff Hester

item.title: PGR 2025 Q4 — CEO Shareholder Letter Overview
